sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - game might have reset or moved to next level
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result}")

# Check if board is back to initial
seg = current_frame.segmentation
init_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation

# Compare pink strip
pink_match = all(seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash'] == init_seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash'] for i in range(5))
sky_match = all(seg['nodes'][42+i]['hash'] == init_seg['nodes'][42+i]['hash'] for i in range(5))
print(f"Pink strip at initial: {pink_match}")
print(f"Sky blue strip at initial: {sky_match}")

# Check markers
markers = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
for m in markers:
    rows = [p[0] for p in m['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in m['boundary']]
    print(f"Marker: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game reset - try to solve level quickly
# Set all pink positions to top-grid matches
# Pos 1: 1 UP -> (2,3)
# Pos 2: 1 DOWN -> (1,1)
# Pos 3: 2 UP -> (2,3)
# Pos 4: 1 UP -> (1,3)
# Pos 5: already (0,1)

seq = ['UP', 'RIGHT', 'DOWN', 'RIGHT', 'UP', 'UP', 'RIGHT', 'UP', 'RIGHT']
action(seq)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Pink strip after sequence:")
top_hashes = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0': '(0,1)', 'fb80c9b281b063da': '(1,1)', 
              'f4469c244897540c': '(1,3)', 'b4edb3faf810133b': '(2,3)',
              'd38ad0a046a963a0': '(0,3)', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a': '(2,1)'}
for i in range(5):
    h = seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash']
    match = top_hashes.get(h, 'NOT IN TOP')
    print(f"  Pos {i+1}: {match}")

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

# Check if positions are locked
for i in range(5):
    if i > 0:
        action(['LEFT'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    h_before = seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash']
    action(['UP'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    h_after = seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash']
    locked = h_before == h_after
    print(f"  Pos {i+1} locked: {locked}")
    if not locked:
        action(['DOWN'])  # reset

print(f"\nLevel completed after lock check: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
